fix: resolves issue that prevents refreshing all keywords when one fails

Currently when the refresh all button is clicked, if one of the keyword scrape fails, rest of the keyword scraping is aborted.

author: towfiqi
message:
fix: resolves cron issue with certain port mapping config

Since the cron is calling the next_public_app_url, if the docker port mapping is 3000:5000, the cron can't access the 5000 port as its for external use only

author: towfiqi
message:
fix: resolves broken google ads oauth of instances behind reverse proxy

closes #326

**Root cause:** `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL` gets inlined by Next.js at build time (because of the NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix). During Docker builds, this variable isn't set or defaults to http://localhost:3000, so the compiled API route hardcodes that value regardless of the runtime environment.

Reduced default font size.

author: towfiqi
message:
feat: adds dynamic scraping to tackle num=100 block.

Google introduced a change that disabled `num=100` from SERP requests, limiting results to 10 per request.
This meant keywords ranked beyond position 10 would always show as **"Not in First 100"**, even if they ranked on page 2–10.

**Goal:** Implement a flexible 3-tier scrape strategy system that lets users control how many pages are scraped per keyword, at both the global and per-domain level.

**Basic** (default): Scrape only the first page (10 results). Fastest, fewest API credits.
**Custom**: Scrape a fixed number of pages configured by the user (1–10).
**Smart** : Scrape the page where the keyword was last seen ± 1 neighbor. Optionally falls back to all 10 pages if the keyword is not found.

resolves #310

author: towfiqi
message:
fix: resolve Google Search Console Forbidden errors and silent cron failure

- Normalize domain name before constructing sc-domain: siteUrl by stripping
  http(s)://, www., and trailing slashes. Fixes Forbidden errors reported when
  domains are stored with a protocol or www prefix (fixes #232, #180)

- Fix cron SC refresh silently skipping all domains: cronRefreshSearchConsoleData
  now calls getSearchConsoleApiInfo() per domain and passes credentials to
  fetchDomainSCData(), which previously received no scAPI argument and did nothing

- Fix checkSerchConsoleIntegration passing raw encrypted credentials to the API:
  replaced manual JSON.parse with getSearchConsoleApiInfo() so credentials are
  properly decrypted before the validation request is made

- Update Search Console integration docs: add Enable API callout, service account
  creation steps, iam.disableServiceAccountKeyCreation workaround for post-May 2024
  orgs, Full permission requirement in Step 4, and a Property Type selection guide
  explaining Domain vs URL-prefix properties and the common Forbidden error cause

 resolves #180, #232

author: towfiqi
message:
fix: resolves "client-side exception has occurred" error.

If any keyword has a country code not present in the countries lookup object (e.g. an unusual Google Search Console country code, or something added via an edge case), countries[c] is `undefined` → countries[c][0] throws `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0')` inside the useMemo, which Next.js 12's error boundary turns into the full-page "Application error" crash.

resolves #271

author: towfiqi
message:
fix: resolves incorrect country flag in email in some cases

Instead of using flagcdn.com, now converts the country ISO code to emoji ("PT" → 🇵🇹) so that the OS displays its own emoji for that country's ISO code.
